initiative.name: HomoPlasticus WP Rebuild — Stage 1: Plugin Foundation (Milestone A)
initiative.objective: Deliver an installable, marketplace-ready WordPress plugin with the Abilities Registry, Auth layer, Site Admin Pack, Content Pack (block-editor aligned), and Setup Wizard. Block patterns visible in theme editor. MCP discovery endpoint live.

teammates.name: builder-foundation
teammates.objective: Build the plugin shell (WO-001), Discovery endpoint (WO-003), Site Admin Pack (WO-005), and Setup Wizard (WO-012). Owns the packaging, admin screen, and operator onboarding surface.
teammates.notes: WO-001 runs first (no deps). WO-003 unblocks after WO-002 signals registry ready. WO-005 unblocks after security gate on WO-004. WO-012 is last — depends on WO-003, WO-010, WO-011 all complete.

teammates.name: builder-registry-auth
teammates.objective: Build the Abilities Registry core (WO-002) and Auth/Authorization layer (WO-004). These are the two security-gate work orders — both use frontier model and require security-reviewer sign-off before downstream pack work begins.
teammates.notes: WO-002 runs first (depends on WO-001 from builder-foundation). WO-004 runs after WO-002 is complete. After BOTH are done, broadcast to lead for security-reviewer gate before builder-content can start WO-006.

teammates.name: builder-content
teammates.objective: Build the Content Pack (WO-006): all 11 content abilities, centralized URL builder, block content sanitizer, and HomoPlasticus block patterns in the theme. Also updates wp-mcp-server to proxy page operations to the new PHP abilities.
teammates.notes: MUST wait for security-reviewer gate on WO-002 + WO-004 before starting. This is the highest-value delivery in Milestone A.

teammates.name: security-reviewer
teammates.objective: Independently validate the Abilities Registry permission model (WO-002) and Auth/Authorization layer (WO-004). Produce a security sign-off or findings list before any pack work proceeds.
taskSequence: GATE: security review of WO-002 + WO-004
teammates.notes: READ-ONLY. Produces findings report. Lead unblocks builder-content only after this agent reports PASS.

doneCriteria: pnpm nx run wp-plugin-foundry-bridge:build succeeds and produces installable zip
pnpm nx run wp-plugin-foundry-bridge:lint passes WPCS with zero violations
pnpm nx run wp-plugin-foundry-bridge:test passes — registry, auth, content pack, URL builder unit tests
pnpm nx run wp-mcp-server:typecheck passes with zero errors
GET /wp-json/ai-foundry/v1/discovery returns valid JSON with abilities count >= 22
WP block editor shows HomoPlasticus patterns in Insert > Patterns panel
content.propose-update returns proposal_id, preview_url (absolute HTTPS), canonical_url
security-reviewer reports PASS on abilities registry and auth layer
readme.txt passes WordPress.org validator format check
